concerns.text: FR-002 states 'null percentage < minimal threshold' without specifying the numerical threshold. SC-013 defines <5%, but FR-002 should cite this value directly for standalone verifiability. 'Minimal threshold' is not a measurable value.

FR-006 states 'validation target (hyperbolic volume) is measured independently' but does not specify the validation threshold. SC-014 defines ≥90% match threshold, but FR-013 should explicitly state this threshold for standalone verifiability.
SC-005 uses 'vast majority' initially before quantifying as ≥95%. While the threshold is eventually specified, the initial phrasing is not independently measurable without reading the full criterion.

FR-001 states 'validated completeness for Phase 1 focuses on crossing number ≤10' but does not specify the validation threshold. SC-001 defines null percentage <5%, but FR-001 should reference this for complete verifiability.
